title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on a user's computer and automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications to complete complex workflows. It is available exclusively in Claude Pro and Max subscription plans and supports modes for chat, cowork, and code operations.
